query_strategy_description: 22 web-search queries grouped into 7 buckets that map to the report's 14 sections. Channel-share + margin figures are the highest-difficulty data points — most aggregator firms hide them behind paywalls (which we never cite anyway). Prefer Nielsen retail audit excerpts that surface in trade press, listed FMCG annual reports (channel disclosures in MD&A), customs HS-code aggregates, ministry-of-trade modern-trade licensing data, distributor company filings, and quick-commerce platform press releases.

localized_search.source_tagging: English alias only (e.g. [GSO 2024]) per L.3. Page-bottom SOURCE KEY may include original local-language source name for traceability.
localized_search.currency_hint: Fire a parallel local-currency query for sizing buckets (e.g. VND/IDR/THB/JPY/KRW) since local stats rarely report in USD.
localized_search.note: Phase M.1: dual-language search. EN baseline still runs (existing query_buckets above); this block governs the additional local-language pass.

query_buckets.purpose: Channel mix share + 3-5 year trend across modern trade / traditional / e-commerce / direct / instant delivery -> drives 06_channel_landscape + 07_channel_mix_evolution
queries: {{country}} {{industry}} retail channel mix Nielsen scan track
{{country}} {{industry}} general trade share warung sari-sari mom and pop {{year}}
expected_sources: listed FMCG company annual reports (channel disclosures)
trade press (CampaignAsia, Inside Retail Asia, Marketing Interactive)
ministry of trade modern-trade licensing data
industry trade associations
query_buckets.expected_tag_mix: secondary 60% / estimate 40% (channel splits are rarely fully disclosed; KIRA triangulates from multiple operator disclosures)

query_buckets.purpose: E-commerce share total + by sub-segment, marketplace concentration -> drives 13_ecom_subsegment_penetration + supports 06 + 12
queries: {{country}} {{industry}} online sales share by category sub-segment
{{country}} marketplace share Shopee Lazada Tokopedia TikTok Shop {{year}}
expected_sources: e-Conomy SEA report (Google/Temasek/Bain) — read but cite the underlying data not the report name
marketplace company filings (Sea Ltd, GoTo, Lazada parent disclosures)
Momentum Works reports
national e-commerce association data

query_buckets.purpose: Named distributors, portfolios, ownership, geographic reach -> drives 10_distributor_matrix
expected_sources: distributor company websites + LinkedIn
trade directories
listed conglomerate disclosures (e.g. PT Enseval, DKSH, Li & Fung, Berli Jucker)
industry trade associations + chambers of commerce
query_buckets.expected_tag_mix: secondary 70% / estimate 20% / primary 10% (KIRA assembles the matrix from multi-source scrape)

query_buckets.purpose: Margin take at each link of the channel cascade, payment terms, MOQ, exclusivity -> drives 08_channel_margin_waterfall + 11_distributor_economics
queries: {{country}} FMCG channel margin brand distributor retailer breakdown
{{country}} {{industry}} retailer markup modern trade traditional trade
expected_sources: listed FMCG MD&A sections (gross margin disclosures by channel)
academic papers on emerging-markets channel economics
trade press distributor profiles
competition authority filings (margin disclosures in price-fixing investigations)
query_buckets.expected_tag_mix: secondary 45% / estimate 55% (margin data is the hardest to source; KIRA triangulates aggressively with explicit anchor methodology)
query_buckets.note: This bucket carries the heaviest estimate share. Every margin % needs an explicit anchor sentence in the methodology endnote.

query_buckets.purpose: Instant delivery / quick-commerce category coverage, AOV, growth -> drives 12_disruption_signals + supports 06
queries: {{country}} quick commerce instant delivery {{industry}} GrabMart Foodpanda Shopee Now
{{country}} instant grocery growth GMV order volume
expected_sources: Grab / GoTo investor decks
Momentum Works quick-commerce reports
trade press (TechInAsia, e27, Rest of World)
platform press releases

query_buckets.purpose: D2C brand penetration + social commerce / live-commerce volume -> drives 12_disruption_signals
queries: {{country}} social commerce TikTok Shop live commerce GMV {{year}}
{{country}} {{industry}} brand owned channel website app share
expected_sources: TikTok Shop platform disclosures
brand annual reports (D2C channel disclosures)
social commerce industry surveys
Cube Asia / Momentum Works platform research

query_buckets.purpose: Distribution depth by city tier / rural reach -> drives 09_geographic_coverage
queries: {{country}} {{industry}} distribution rural reach Tier 2 Tier 3 cities
{{country}} retail outlets count modern trade traditional trade by region
expected_sources: national statistics bureau retail census data ({{country_stats_bureau}})
listed FMCG annual reports (distribution reach disclosures, e.g. 'we cover 500k outlets')
ministry of trade outlet registrations

query_execution_rules.parallelism: Run queries in parallel within a bucket (up to 5 concurrent). Sequential across buckets so later buckets can reference earlier findings (e.g. bucket 03 distributor names feed back into bucket 04 margin queries by name).
result_filtering: Discard results from named-firm aggregators (Mordor, Frost, Euromonitor, IMARC, Synovate, Ipsos) — anti-positioning rule
Prefer results with citeable methodology disclosure (Nielsen retail audit notes, listed-company MD&A, customs aggregates)
If a channel-share number appears in 3+ independent sources within +-5pp, treat as well-anchored secondary
If a margin number appears in only 1 source, either find corroboration or downgrade to KIRA estimate with anchor commentary in the waterfall sidebar
Treat marketplace platform self-disclosures (Shopee/Lazada/TikTok Shop) as primary for their own GMV claims but secondary-with-skepticism for category-level claims
query_execution_rules.estimate_methodology_template: Anchored margin estimate: {{disclosed_anchor}} +- {{range}} = {{output}}. E.g. 'Listed FMCG operator A disclosed 18% gross margin to distributors in {{country}} [secondary]; sector convention places distributor markup 8-12pp on top -> retailer-side margin 22-28% [estimate]'.
query_execution_rules.research_data_output_format: Aggregate findings into a single JSON file matching the shape of references/research_data_R0152.json — top-level keys: channel_share_history, channel_share_current, ecom_by_subsegment, distributor_directory, margin_chain_by_link, payment_terms_norms, geographic_coverage, instant_delivery_metrics, d2c_signals, social_commerce_metrics. Each value tagged with source URL + access date + extraction method.

template_variable_resolution.{{country_stats_bureau}}: Mapped via lookup: ID->BPS, VN->GSO, TH->NSO, PH->PSA, MY->DOSM, SG->SingStat, etc.
template_variable_resolution.{{sub_industry_1}}: First sub_industry from parser (if multi-segment topic)
template_variable_resolution.{{year}}: Topic year (parser output, default current year)

high_difficulty_data_flags: Channel-share splits by % of category value — rarely fully disclosed; expect to triangulate from 4-6 disclosures
Margin take at each link of the channel cascade — almost always estimate; flag clearly in methodology endnote
Sub-channel splits within traditional trade (warung vs minimarket vs wet market) — usually requires named-operator extrapolation
Distributor revenue / volume share — private distributors often don't publish; rank-order is more defensible than absolute share
